title: Teachers Lean on Side Hustles

source.title: Teachers turning to side hustles to pay the bills: "I'm going to just keep hustling"

segments.title: Multiple Jobs
segments.audioText: Over a third of U.S. workers now hold multiple jobs just to keep up, according to a recent survey by ZipRecruiter.
segments.transcript: Over a third of U.S. workers now hold multiple jobs just to keep up, according to a recent survey by ZipRecruiter.
segments.translationZh: 根據 ZipRecruiter 最近一項調查，超過三分之一美國工人而家要做幾份工，先至勉強追得上生活開支。

points.label: Over a third of U.S. workers
points.explanationZh: Over a third 即超過三分之一；新聞講比例時好常見。

points.label: hold multiple jobs
points.explanationZh: hold a job 係有一份工作；multiple jobs 即幾份工。

points.label: just to keep up
points.explanationZh: just to 表示『只係為咗』；keep up 係追得上、應付到。

points.label: according to a recent survey
points.explanationZh: according to... 係新聞引用資料來源嘅固定開頭。

segments.title: School Teachers
segments.audioText: Meg Oliver shows how many school teachers are working side hustles in this Affordability in America.
segments.transcript: Meg Oliver shows how many school teachers are working side hustles in this Affordability in America.
segments.translationZh: Meg Oliver 會喺今集《Affordability in America》入面，帶大家睇有幾多學校老師正做副業。

points.label: shows how many
points.explanationZh: shows how many 即『展示有幾多』；how many 後面留意可數名詞。

points.label: school teachers
points.explanationZh: school teachers 指學校老師，範圍比 teachers 更清楚。

points.label: working side hustles
points.explanationZh: side hustle 係副業、兼職搵外快；working side hustles 係做緊副業。

segments.title: Second Jobs
segments.audioText: According to a recent survey, 71% of U.S. public school teachers said they work at least one second job.
segments.transcript: According to a recent survey, 71% of U.S. public school teachers said they work at least one second job.
segments.translationZh: 根據最近一項調查，71% 美國公立學校老師話佢哋至少做一份第二工作。

points.label: 71% of U.S. public school teachers
points.explanationZh: 百分比後面接 of 加群體；public school teachers 即公立學校老師。

points.label: said they work
points.explanationZh: 新聞報告調查結果時，常用 said they... 表示受訪者咁講。

points.label: at least one second job
points.explanationZh: at least 即至少；second job 係正職以外另一份工。

sentences: Over a third of U.S. workers now hold multiple jobs just to keep up, according to a recent survey by ZipRecruiter.
Meg Oliver shows how many school teachers are working side hustles in this Affordability in America.
According to a recent survey, 71% of U.S. public school teachers said they work at least one second job.

vocabulary.example: The survey asked teachers about second jobs.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢項調查問老師關於第二工作嘅情況。
有啲工作人士需要額外收入。

vocabulary.meaningZh: 負擔能力；價錢可承受程度
vocabulary.example: Affordability is a big concern for families.
vocabulary.translationZh: 負擔能力係好多家庭關心嘅大問題。

vocabulary.example: She teaches at a public school.
vocabulary.translationZh: 佢喺一間公立學校教書。

vocabulary.example: A side hustle can bring in extra income.
vocabulary.translationZh: 副業可以帶嚟額外收入。

phrases.meaningZh: 只係為咗追得上／應付到
phrases.example: Some people work extra hours just to keep up.
According to a recent survey, many teachers work second jobs.
She has a side hustle after school.
Some teachers work at least one second job.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，留意 Over a third of U.S. workers 呢段要一口氣聽成一個資料 chunk。
重播 00:25，先寫低 According to a recent survey，再補 71% of U.S. public school teachers。
用 side hustle 練替換：I have a small side hustle on weekends.
用兩句英文複述：Many workers have more than one job. Some teachers work side hustles to keep up.

notes: 今日重點係聽生活成本同工作新聞入面嘅數字、比例同調查來源。
先用時間碼聽 00:00、00:12、00:25；第二次先睇稿，特別留意 multiple jobs 同 second job 嘅分別。
side hustle 係現代美式口語常用詞，可以講副業、兼職或正職以外嘅小生意。
dailyLifePractice 會配合工作同日常安排，練簡短更新、改約時間同禮貌問店員。

dailyLifePractice.title: Giving a Quick Work Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：同事問你今日進度，你要簡短交代自己手頭上比較忙。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: I'm finishing up one thing first. I should have it ready by this afternoon. If anything changes, I'll let you know.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'm finishing up one thing first.
lines.zh: 我而家先完成緊一樣嘢。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I should have it ready by this afternoon.
lines.zh: 我應該今日下午前可以整好。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Sounds good. Thanks for the heads-up.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: coming along 係問進度好自然嘅講法。I should have it ready... 比 I will 更有彈性，適合未百分百肯定但有把握嘅情況。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 this afternoon 換成 tomorrow morning、by noon 或 before the meeting。
drills.example: I should have it ready before the meeting.

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Thanks for the heads-up 三次。

dailyLifePractice.title: Changing Plans After Work
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你臨時要加班或做副業，要同朋友改約時間。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Can we push dinner back a bit? I got held up at work. I can be there around seven-thirty.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Can we push dinner back a bit?
lines.zh: 我哋可唔可以將晚餐推遲少少？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I got held up at work.
lines.zh: 我返工嗰邊有啲事阻住咗。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I can be there around seven-thirty.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: push dinner back a bit 係好自然嘅改時間講法；got held up 表示被事情拖住，唔需要解釋太多細節。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Can we push...back a bit? 改另一個安排。
drills.example: Can we push the call back a bit?

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 朋友問 What's going on? 用一句簡短英文答。
drills.example: I got held up at work.

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking for Help in a Store
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺店入面趕時間，要禮貌問店員某樣貨品喺邊。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Excuse me, where can I find printer paper? I'm in a bit of a rush. Thanks, I appreciate it.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Excuse me, where can I find printer paper?
lines.zh: 唔好意思，打印紙喺邊度可以搵到？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Great. I'm in a bit of a rush.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: I'm in a bit of a rush 係好常用嘅柔和講法，比 I'm very busy 聽落自然。I appreciate it 比單講 thanks 更有禮貌少少。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 printer paper 換成 batteries、envelopes 或 a phone charger。
drills.example: Where can I find a phone charger?

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 I'm in a bit of a rush 講一個你要快啲完成嘅情況。
drills.example: I'm in a bit of a rush. I have a meeting in ten minutes.
